question: What color is the apron worn by the woman standing behind the kitchen island? A. Purple B. Red C. Blue D. Green

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with dark curly hair wearing a purple long-sleeved top and dark blue apron stands behind a wooden countertop. She holds a red rectangular ceramic baking dish filled with dark brown round food items above a silver metal baking sheet. A black shallow bowl rests on the counter to the right of the baking sheet. Stainless steel ovens and cream-colored cabinets stand in the background.

Describe the sequence of visual elements and actions shown from the beginning of the video until the chef gestures.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the green eHow logo appears on white; at 2s, the word food displays on a red background; at 4s, a woman in a purple top stands behind a kitchen island; at 12s, a person holds a red dish with roasted beets; at 18s, she gestures with open hands near the baking sheet.

canonical_answer: She places the peeled beet into a black round pan.
